29328.name: Credit
29328.desc: This currency, used by the Interastral Peace Corporation to settle accounts with its customers, is now widely accepted as the hard currency for space travel.
29328.lore: "People run around fighting and trading for numbers in a terminal, but the truly precious cannot be bought."

125435.name: Tracks of Destiny
125435.lore: Your victory is secured by countless failures, and the small steps you have taken led you to the turning point of fate.

409960.name: Traveler's Guide
409960.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>20,000</nobr> Character EXP.
409960.lore:
Required reading for world exploration. Press the "Read" button to tune in to an attractive voice in a language you understand, telling you about the legendary encounters of renowned adventurers across different worlds as well as the precious wisdom and knowledge that they have gathered.

"All-new series of the Traveler's Guide, The Chef's Manual to Galactic Cuisine, is now available for purchase."
"For submissions, please connect to synesthesia beacon ERD-23θ to contact an Intelligentsia Guild representative. Method of payment can be arranged to your convenience."

409961.name: Adventure Log
409961.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>5000</nobr> Character EXP.
409961.lore:
A neatly organized collection of educational adventure notes containing countless illustrations and texts entailing adventures from beginning to end, as well as valuable information and survival-related techniques.

"Why not just digitize it and save it on a photolith disk? That'd be much more convenient."
"Advanced technology is far more fragile than you'd think when faced with stellar storms and neuron flow eruptions. Besides, I'm sure the author of this book wanted people to read it in the simplest of ways."

409962.name: Travel Encounters
409962.desc: Experience material for characters. Provides <nobr>1000</nobr> Character EXP.
409962.lore:
A travel diary with messy handwriting and random content. It's not of much use to you.

"Dan Heng, hurry up and finish reading it so you can throw it away."

13251172.name: The Fluffy Serialization Memorial Issue
13251172.desc: Fluffy Across the Blue currently in magazine serialization. Moderately increases the Traces of Elation characters.
13251172.lore:
Rumor has it that a Phantasmoon Games winner once accelerated time, leaving every artist in Planarcadia unable to meet their deadlines, except for Blurry. This is clearly just a tabloid story, and knowing them, QR_Colt probably wrote it themselves.

"I was born drawing as well as Graphia, but it took me an entire lifetime to learn how to draw as fast as a Bullet Wyrm." — QR_Colt, during an online interview

13392580.name: Vanquished Flow's Reticence
13392580.lore:
None remembered the sudden moment when the universe fell silent. The voice of thoughts dissolved. All shapes were recognized as identical pixels, captured by the anti-memetic web, transformed into a singular extrapolation.
Until it ceased to "speak."

"Core▀▄verdict▀▄█loop▄█▀entity▄me▀▄"

13525398.name: The Fluffy Collector's Edition
13525398.desc: Fluffy Across the Blue, now in published standalone volumes. Greatly increases the Traces of Elation characters.
13525398.lore:
The book's wrap-around band is packed with glowing reviews from cosmic icons like Pearl, Jade, Aventurine, Topaz, Ratio, Jing Yuan, Feixiao, Huaiyan, Yao Guang, Hua, Kafka, Robin, Arita, Schneider, Duke Inferno, Hoolay, Ryusuke, Sparkle, Sparxie, and Trailblazer. Blurry eventually lost a fortune in lawsuits for "forging endorsements and false advertising."

"Counselor Umbralle, these petty celebrities are all ganging up to sue me. Can I hire you as my defense?"
"Hahaha, you're funny. But I'd quite like to stay alive, thank you."

13618289.name: The Fluffy Hand-drawn Storyboards
13618289.desc: Fluffy Across the Blue in its storyboard stage. Slightly increases the Traces of Elation characters.
13618289.lore:
Blurry is an incredibly fast artist who can draw a month's worth of work in a single day. But they never do, claiming they need to "guarantee quality," though they're likely just allergic to work.

"It's so weird... how are there so many identical manuscripts of 'The Fluffy' out there, and every single one is clearly an original? Is Blurry selling these to make a quick buck?"
"No way! Blurry is just a perfectionist who draws every page ten times until it's exactly right."

19581247.name: Lucid Awl
19581247.desc: A Wishpower fragment from an imagenated creature. An advanced material used for enhancement.
19581247.lore:
Every story worth taking seriously shares the same theme: "How to live the one life we're given."
Life is so short that even the greatest sages are suddenly tossed into this world, forced to experience a lifetime without any preparation. That is why no one ever lives a perfect life. There are always regrets, always moments wasted.
But luckily, we have stories. In stories, creators and readers share a different life. In stories, the human experience is continuously extended. And in stories, we can reach immortality from within our finite cages.

"With stories, we are able to live a thousand lifetimes."
comeFrom: Drops from imagenated creatures at Equilibrium Level 4

19623238.name: Whimsy Wax
19623238.desc: A Wishpower fragment from an imagenated creature. A crude material used for enhancement.
19623238.lore:
In the primal wilds, a mother asked her child, "Did you break your father's bow?" The child answered, "No, it must have been someone else."
"No one else has ever stepped foot in this cave," the mother said. "If it wasn't you, then it must have been me." The child continued, "A gremlin did it. I saw it with my own eyes, but only kids can see them, so that's why you didn't."
The mother laughed. "Fine then, why would a gremlin break your father's bow?" The child said calmly, "Father probably stepped on its nest. You adults can't see gremlins, so you're always breaking their homes."
Whether this talk actually happened is irrelevant. The truth it holds is undeniable — the first stories were born from the imagination of a child.
For billions of years since, those same fantasies have continued to change the world.

"With stories, we are able to escape from reality."

19865384.name: Dreamweave Steel
19865384.desc: A Wishpower fragment from an imagenated creature. A normal material used for enhancement.
19865384.lore:
Remember the old story? An officer pointed at a painting that exposed his atrocities and asked, "Did you paint this?"
The artist smiled and replied, "No, you did."
Art that tries to represent reality cannot simply copy it. The shallow surface of reality can never capture its profound, intangible essence.
Consider a fallen soldier. If you only paint their likeness, they are just one more face among the nameless dead. But if you look past the surface to find the invisible honor, courage, rage, and regret, that is when you truly reach their reality.
Only then will people know that this soldier was not just another statistic. This was someone who once brought the pulse of life to the mountains, the waters, and the homes they left behind.

"With stories, we are able to fight back against evil."
comeFrom: Drops from imagenated creatures at Equilibrium Level 2

29937571.name: Invasive Clot
29937571.desc: Black Tide Creatures' core crystal. Can be used for the Ascension of Physical characters.
29937571.lore:
Truly, the followers of black tide appear in countless forms and can reliably be identified by their crystals. Yet, no one realizes that what seems to be the core is, in truth, merely the "outer shell."

"I saw a sea of crystals, and then — the relieved smile of the physician."

ranks.name: Chuckle Chimes Where Jade Falls
ranks.descHash: In <u>Aha's</u> <u>extra turn</u> triggered by Ultimate, the fixed amount of <u>Punchline</u> taken into account increases to <nobr>#2[i]</nobr>. When dealing <u>Elation DMG</u>, all ally targets ignore <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr> of the target's DEF.

ranks.name: Blind Arrows Guided by Feathers
ranks.descHash: While the Zone is active, increases all ally targets' SPD by <nobr>#2[i]%</nobr>, and additionally increases Elation by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>.

ranks.name: Auspices Mirrored In Decalight
ranks.descHash:
Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 10.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

ranks.name: Threads of Fate Colored by Plumes
ranks.descHash: In <u>Aha's</u> <u>extra turn</u> triggered by Yao Guang's Ultimate, the DMG dealt by all ally characters' Elation Skill becomes <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr> of the original DMG.

ranks.name: Bejeweled in Radiant Grace
ranks.descHash:
Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.
Elation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. 15.

ranks.name: Ferried Along the Astral Arc
ranks.descHash: All ally targets' <u>Elation DMG</u> <u>merrymakes</u> by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>. Increases the DMG multiplier of Yao Guang's Elation Skill by <nobr>#2[i]%</nobr> of its original multiplier.

skills.descHash: Deals Physical DMG equal to #1[i]% of Yao Guang's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to #2[i]% of Yao Guang's ATK to targets adjacent to it. The Energy regenerated from Basic ATK increases to 30.
skills.name: Whistlebolt Sings Joy

skills.descHash: Deploys a Zone for #1[i] turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. While the Zone is active, increases all allies' Elation by an amount equal to #2[f1]% of Yao Guang's Elation. After Yao Guang uses Basic ATK or Skill, gains #3[i] Punchline.
skills.name: Decalight Unveils All

skills.descHash: Gains #1[i] Punchline. Aha immediately gains 1 extra turn where a fixed amount of #4[i] Punchline is taken into account. This turn, does not consume Punchline, and increases all allies' All-Type RES PEN by #2[f1]% for #3[i] turn(s).
skills.name: Hexagram of Feathered Fortune

skills.descHash:
While Yao Guang holds "Certified Banger":
After an ally target uses an attack, triggers the "Great Boon" effect, dealing 1 additional instance of #1[f1]% Elation DMG of the corresponding Type to 1 random hit target. If this attack consumes Skill Points, then additionally triggers "Great Boon" 1 time.
When triggering the "Great Boon" effect, if the attacker's Elation is lower than that of Yao Guang, then this instance of Elation DMG will take Yao Guang's Elation into calculation.
Triggering the "Great Boon" effect is not considered as using 1 instance of attack.
skills.name: Behold Wherever Light Unfolds

skills.descHash: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.
skills.name: Whistlebolt Sings Joy

skills.descHash: After using Technique, automatically triggers Skill 1 time at the start of the next battle without consuming any Skill Points. When Yao Guang is in the team, breaking destructible objects immediately grants Fortune Pouch, up to <nobr>#1[i]</nobr> within every Earth Week.
skills.name: Untethered Glimmer Sails Far

skills.descHash: Inflicts "Woe's Whisper" on all enemies, lasting for #4[i] turn(s). Enemy targets under the "Woe's Whisper" state take #3[f1]% increased DMG. Deals #2[i]% Physical Elation DMG to all enemies. Then, deals #5[i] instance(s) of #6[i]% Physical Elation DMG to one random enemy.
skills.name: Let Thy Fortune Burst in Flames

embedBonusSkill.descHash: When Yao Guang's SPD is <nobr>#1[i]</nobr> or higher, increases this unit's Elation by <nobr>#2[i]%</nobr>. For every <nobr>#3[i]</nobr> SPD exceeded, increases this unit's Elation by <nobr>#4[i]%</nobr>. Up to a max of <nobr>#5[i]</nobr> excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.
embedBonusSkill.name: Amaze-In Grace

embedBonusSkill.descHash: Increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <nobr>#4[i]%</nobr>. After using Elation Skill, recovers <nobr>#1[i]</nobr> Skill Point(s) for the team.
embedBonusSkill.name: Poised and Sated

embedBonusSkill.descHash: When Yao Guang gains "<u>Certified Banger</u>," its duration increases by <nobr>#2[i]</nobr> turn(s).
embedBonusSkill.name: Felicity Ensemble

voiceItems.title: First Meeting
voiceItems.text: I am General Yao Guang, Seer Strategist aboard the Xianzhou Yuque. Like everyone else, you may simply call me Madam Yao. It's true, I could have divined the finer details of this encounter, but where's the fun in that? Being here in person has turned up some rather pleasant surprises.

voiceItems.title: Greeting
voiceItems.text: Judging by today's weather, I'd wager you'll cross paths with the greatest mind in the entire Xianzhou Alliance... I never said that person was me, did I?

voiceItems.title: Parting
voiceItems.text: With skies so high and the world so wide, there's nothing that can hold you back. Next time we cross paths, I expect tales of exploits so grand they'll leave me speechless.

voiceItems.title: About Self: Form of Address
voiceItems.text: The title of "General" always comes shackled with weight and formality. "Madam" feels far freer, far lighter, wouldn't you agree? Of course, I've never cared much for formality. If you'd rather address me as "Sis"... Well, that could be fun too.

voiceItems.title: About Self: Eye of Īśvara
voiceItems.text: My gaze has swept across the cosmos more than once, and I've seen the fate of the cosmos rocking like a ship on the verge of being swallowed by towering waves. Still, I've never put my faith in "seeing is believing." Possibility, after all, exists for no other reason than to be defied.

voiceItems.title: About Self: Outlook
voiceItems.text: Most diviners like to say "humanity's calculations are no match for heaven's plans," while the exceptional ones like to behave as if "heaven's plans are no match for my calculations." But if you ask me, all that scheming and calculating is wasted effort. Better to seize the moment yourself: clean, swift, decisive.

voiceItems.title: Chat: Hand Balm
voiceItems.text: Whether it's polishing a piece of jade or setting the heavens in motion, both demand a deft touch. That's why, no matter how busy official business gets, I still steal a moment to craft my own hand balm.

voiceItems.title: Chat: Sour Things
voiceItems.text: Those of the Yuque savor sourness, as naturally as the Luofu folks cherish their tea. Lemons, pickled plums, hawthorn berries... perfect jolts for when the mind grows dull. Fancy a bite?

voiceItems.title: Hobbies
voiceItems.text: Back when I was studying at the Divination Commission, I may have pulled a few tricks here and there, and somehow won the Yuque Cup several years running. If others claim my divination technique lacks refinement, fine, I'll accept that critique. But call me a bad card player? Now that's just slander. Why not come see for yourself when I play Huaiyan and Feixiao next time?

voiceItems.title: Annoyances
voiceItems.text: There are those in the Alliance who, upon seeing the Matrix's calculations, become hesitant and indecisive. If a divination ever dares to return "This reading is unreliable," I suspect their decaying minds would simply explode on the spot.

voiceItems.title: Something to Share
voiceItems.text: Inspired by the extrapolations of Wisdomwalker, the Yuque constructed the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier for divining the future. A jeweled web that mirrors the world itself, its radiance multiplying without end. And thanks to a little... mishap, I once glimpsed every possible outcome through it. Heh, that so-called "variability"? That's just another word for "opportunity."

voiceItems.title: Knowledge
voiceItems.text: The Reignbow granted me a Spiritus known as the Kālacakra Skyplume — the "eye" of The Hunt itself. I just call it "Little Bird." Feel it watching you? Well, that's only natural. The cosmos's shining hero deserves an audience.

voiceItems.title: About Trailblazer
voiceItems.text: Your future does not lie within my sight, but rather beneath your own feet. As for that little secret... Well, only the heavens, the earth, and you know. I know nothing of it.
voiceItems.unlockRequirement: Unlocked after completing the Trailblaze Mission "The Indifference of Those Who Yet Live"

voiceItems.title: About Jing Yuan
voiceItems.text: People say I'm always competing with the Divine Foresight, but little do they know we're just being honest with each other. Superficial harmony won't help the Xianzhou's development. If someone needs to play the stalwart to stir up these still waters and spark a grand competition of a hundred ships, then I'll gladly take on that role.

voiceItems.title: About Fu Xuan
voiceItems.text: Ah, my dear junior soror... Even when she comes to report to the Yuque, she doesn't stay a day longer than necessary, insisting on returning right on schedule. She used to love competing with me when she was little, but now her rival has become that General of the Luofu... even though I knew her first.

voiceItems.title: About Fugue
voiceItems.text: They say foxians from the merchant guild are good at going whichever way the wind blows, but her rudder stays remarkably steady. Speaking up for the common folk, calling out the Aeons' injustice... That kind of boldness is rare, and I like it.

voiceItems.title: About Sparxie
voiceItems.text: That girl is like a firecracker, always catching people off-guard. If she were willing to make some mischief with me... Hmm, we could definitely accomplish things no one's done before.

voiceItems.title: About Himeko
voiceItems.text: She keeps her edge hidden and doesn't draw attention to herself... Even you know very little about her past, don't you? But everyone must return to where they started at some point in life, and from there, embark on a new journey.

voiceItems.title: About Sunday
voiceItems.text: A Xianzhou General roping in Penacony's former top brass? Sounds unbelievable, doesn't it? But that's exactly the kind of "unpredictable" twist I'm after. As for what surprises lie ahead... Well, we'll just have to wait and see.
voiceItems.unlockRequirement: Unlocked after completing the Trailblaze Mission "The Indifference of Those Who Yet Live"

voiceItems.title: About Qingque
voiceItems.text: Many spend their whole lives chasing their dreams, but she alone knows that "ignorance is bliss".. hey, don't laugh. That's actually an essential quality for becoming a General.

voiceItems.title: About Feixiao
voiceItems.text: The Merlin's Claw acts as the talons of The Hunt. "Eyes" without "talons" are weak, and "talons" without "eyes" are blind. She loves hearing my ideas, and I trust her commands. Although every time she gives me fitness advice — telling me to ditch the peacock dance for the sparrow fist — she's giving me a bit too much credit.

voiceItems.title: About Jingliu
voiceItems.text: I don't mind her utilizing the remnants of the Propagation, burning the golden blood of the Destruction, or even borrowing the power of the Abundance itself. It's just that the picture she's painted, unfortunately, has yet to fully convince me.

voiceItems.title: Eidolon Activation
voiceItems.text: The moon's cycles are fixed, the universe is boundless, and yet human effort decides success.

voiceItems.title: Character Ascension
voiceItems.text: Do not be troubled by waxing or waning.

voiceItems.title: Max Level Reached
voiceItems.text: Would it not be uninteresting if the omniscia truly spared none?

voiceItems.title: Trace Activation
voiceItems.text: Does this road have more variables to come?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Trailblazer
voiceItems.text: As expected, your fate remains inscrutable.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Jing Yuan
voiceItems.text: "Intellect rivaled only by military strategy..." Shall we put that to the test, Divine Foresight?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Jingliu
voiceItems.text: Is your blade still as keen as it was?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Fugue
voiceItems.text: If I could trouble you to take charge of correspondences⁓

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Fu Xuan
voiceItems.text: Junior soror, shall we stick to our previous methodology?

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Sparxie
voiceItems.text: This engagement must be no less constructive than the last, young lady.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Himeko
voiceItems.text: May our cooperation bear fruit, Navigator.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Sunday
voiceItems.text: Worry not, I never force anyone to do anything.

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Qingque
voiceItems.text: Good fortune, little Que⁓

voiceItems.title: Added to Team With Feixiao
voiceItems.text: In the days apart from the Merlin's Claw... I thought up a few wonderful things. Care to listen?

voiceItems.title: Battle Begins: Weakness Break
voiceItems.text: Trouble ahead... What? It's my fault?

voiceItems.title: Battle Begins: Danger Alert
voiceItems.text: Fortune favors the bold. Make your move.

voiceItems.title: Turn Begins 1
voiceItems.text: Divination tells me that this will hurt.

voiceItems.title: Turn Begins 2
voiceItems.text: Troublemaker? I'd like to be one too.

voiceItems.title: Turn Idling
voiceItems.text: Today's a good day for attacking. Trust me.

voiceItems.title: Basic ATK
voiceItems.text: As easy as that.

voiceItems.title: Skill 1
voiceItems.text: Stars of fortune favor us.

voiceItems.title: Skill 2
voiceItems.text: Ominous clouds have scattered.

voiceItems.title: Hit by Light Attack
voiceItems.text: Blessing in disguise.

voiceItems.title: Hit by Heavy Attack
voiceItems.text: An evil portent...

voiceItems.title: Elation Skill 1
voiceItems.text: May you have the best of luck. To an explosive start!

voiceItems.title: Elation Skill 2
voiceItems.text: Here's a bad omen slip. No need to thank me~

voiceItems.title: Ultimate: Activate
voiceItems.text: People always say that the will of heaven can't be overturned...

voiceItems.title: Ultimate: Unleash
voiceItems.text: But I wish to observe the heavens with my divinations.

voiceItems.title: Downed
voiceItems.text: This can't be fate...

voiceItems.title: Return to Battle
voiceItems.text: Heaven blesses the kind.

voiceItems.title: Health Recovery
voiceItems.text: Thank you for your help.

voiceItems.title: Technique
voiceItems.text: All's revealed in divining light.

voiceItems.title: Battle Won
voiceItems.text: Limitless possibilities still exist within the omniscia.

voiceItems.title: Treasure Opening 1
voiceItems.text: Surprises sure go hand-in-hand with you.

voiceItems.title: Treasure Opening 2
voiceItems.text: The feng shui here's pretty good. I've made a note of it.

voiceItems.title: Precious Treasure Opening
voiceItems.text: See? This is Madam Yao's luck.

voiceItems.title: Successful Puzzle-Solving 1
voiceItems.text: You're using this to test ME, a general?

voiceItems.title: Successful Puzzle-Solving 2
voiceItems.text: Oh please. This didn't even need any calculations.

voiceItems.title: Enemy Target Found
voiceItems.text: Is today a special day?

voiceItems.title: Returning to Town
voiceItems.text: Leisure comes easy... Pity that I struggle to keep my sights on the present.

storyItems.title: Character Details
storyItems.text:
Mysterious, bold, radical... her quest for change is stunning.
With the "eye" of The Hunt, she sees all fates. Though she knows fate is immutable, the Seer Strategist still walks into danger alone.
With the odds stacked against her, how can she possibly change her destiny?

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part I
storyItems.text:
One day, after the morning meeting at the Yuque's Divination Commission, the solemn silence was broken by snippets of idle gossip.

"First she skips morning practice, and now she runs off to the Yuque Cup tournament!"
"When I confronted her, she said only a true master of augury could be called a 'Master of Cards,' and I should play her if I didn't believe it."
"And you actually played against her? Did you win?"
"..."

Several robes fluttered in the wind, as if holding a bellyful of grievances.

"Remember last time? She gathered a few young diviners at midnight to sketch matrices, claiming she wanted to test foreign divination techniques and study their strengths. Nearly scared the elder on night patrol out of his wits."
"How could I forget? She publicly challenged her teacher in class with her own invented methods of divination, infuriating him so much he complained to the Master Diviner. If the Master Diviner hadn't been so merciful, she would've been in deep trouble, genius or not..."
"But still... for all her flaws, she did contribute to the formation of the 'Deca-Light Reflection Barrier.' Tell me, who else in the whole division can get the divination right with a single glance?"
"Hmph, do you know what her peers call her now? 'Boss Yao,' saying man's divination is no match for heaven's will, and heaven's will is no match for her. This is nothing like Yuque's simple and austere academic style!"

A simultaneous sigh washed away half their resentment, softening their tones at last.
"Speaking of which, where did that girl run off to now?"

A sudden song drifted in from above. A young girl straddled the rooftop wind vane, gazing up at the heavens. She flashed a bright smile:
"Heads up, seniors! Master did a divination reading for me today, something about 'thunder shakes a hundred miles, yet the ritual vessels remain.' You might want to keep your distance, or you'll get struck by lightning too!"

Right then, thunder instantly roared across the dome of the Yuque, deafening and fierce. Brilliant arcs of lightning unfurled, dazzling to the eye, yet horrifying to the heart.
"If we can't dodge it, might as well sit back and enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime spectacle!"

She knew this commotion was merely vibrations from stardust scraping against the hull as the Yuque passed through a nebula. She would be perfectly safe.

Yet a small doubt still flickered in her heart: did this divination... truly come to pass?
The divination reads: Thunder shakes a hundred miles, yet the ritual vessels remain.

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part II
storyItems.text:
In a secluded courtyard, she sat in the tranquility of the night with her junior soror who had returned home for a visit.
On the simple wooden table, besides two cups of fresh tea, lay a set of divination cards for a game, seemingly veiled in a layer of long-settled dust.

"Have you been to Master Jingtian's place?"
"Yes, I've paid my respects."
"When you left the Yuque, Master had already foreseen this day. So, you still won't consider my proposal? Look, Huaiyan has a granddaughter, Jing Yuan has a disciple. If I ever follow the same path our Master did, it'd be perfect for you to take my place~"

The teacup hung in midair as the pink-haired diviner's brows furrowed slightly.
"Senior soror, becoming a successor General is just a change in position. How did it manage to change your temperament too?"

"Do you remember? Master used to always say: 'Sometimes there is only ever one path in destiny. Everything is predetermined.'"
She focused on her cards in contemplation, as scenes from the past surfaced before her eyes.
Before sending the Cloudpeer Telescope to the Fanghu, Jingtian had assigned her to guard the Yuque, ensuring the success of the plan to eliminate the Abominations of Abundance with the Reignbow's Lux Arrow.
Within the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, she had divined ceaselessly, yet never managed to grasp even a single thread of possibility that could rewrite the battle at the Fanghu.
When the Reignbow's Lux Arrow fell, that inconceivable Aeonic power destroyed everything in its path, yet also forged the hope of the present.

But she knew that navigating the Xianzhou through the increasingly turbulent cosmic currents would only grow more and more challenging.

Beneath the jest, the Master Diviner saw the General's true intent. Perhaps in all of the Xianzhou Alliance, she alone perceived it... but she revealed nothing, merely taking a gentle sip of tea.
"And what about you, senior soror? What will you leave behind for the Xianzhou Yuque?"

She did not answer immediately, but instead played the card in her hand.
"Well, did you see this move coming?"
"Master proved himself right, but that was his legacy. As for me... I want the Xianzhou, centuries from now, to look back on what I leave behind and say..."

She smiled, pondering, conviction settling in her expression.

"'Who'd have expected that destiny could have a path like this too.'"

— The divination reads: Though assembled in place, the will is not yet bright.

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part III
storyItems.text:
Volume Title: Yuque Administrative Edict Records Star Calendar Year ████ File No. Crag-██ (II)
Summary: Application for Ultra-miniaturization Technology of the Jade Abacus
Consultation Content: With phased progress in research on Fallow Earth traits, our academy believes focus should be placed on further miniaturization research of the jade abacus.
Artisanship Commission Opinion: Regarding the Sapientia Academe's funding request for the jade abacus miniaturization research: firstly, their research direction conflicts with the Artisanship Commission's. Secondly, bypassing Commission approval and reporting directly to the General violates proper procedures.
Reviewer: Yao Guang
Opinion: I've reviewed the Artisanship Commission's proposal. Whose brilliant idea was it to improve performance by making the jade abacus bigger? While jade abaci are directly tied to the lifeline of the Xianzhou, we can't be overly cautious and set in our ways. Look at IPC's efficiency. Can we really afford to wait?
...

Volume Title: Yuque Administrative Edict Records Star Calendar Year ████ File No. Goat-██ (III)
Summary: Yuque Navigation Routes
Consultation Content: The Divination Commission's divination indicates that following previous patrolling routes bring low risk and stable returns. Continued exploration along ancient routes invites numerous uncertainties. During this time of cosmic upheaval, such action may provoke calamities...
Reviewer: Yao Guang
Opinion: Proceed with exploration along ancient routes. The jade abacus technology wasn't developed in vain, and our improved extrapolation precision is sufficient to foresee disasters. From an interstellar trade perspective, this is enough to drive the Yuque's annual revenue to a new record high. Yet, looking at the current state of the universe, a cosmic transformation of unprecedented scale approaches, we cannot stay on the old paths. If possible, seek opportunities where the Trailblaze and Erudition converge.
...

Volume Title: Xianzhou Alliance Administrative Edict Records Star Calendar Year ████ File No. Rabbit-██ (VII)
Summary: Regarding the Disposition of Suspects in the Luofu "Ambrosial Arbor" Crisis
Petitioner: Yao Guang
Petition Content: ...The chaos Luocha and Jingliu stirred on the Luofu was likely not merely to deliver the Stellaron into the Xianzhou. According to divination through the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, these two still harbor secrets that may sway the fate of the Xianzhou. I request they be sent to the Yuque for interrogation. If we can grasp this major variable, it might prove to be a crucial piece in achieving victory. While this is not without risk, I am willing to stake my position as the General on this...
Reviewer: Hua
Opinion: Approved.
...

At every crossroad of destiny, her mind would return to those pivotal choices that had shaped the Yuque's current prosperity, yet also charted its course toward an alternate fate.
Did her hands never tremble? She asked herself countless times. Every seemingly effortless and clever move that others saw was, on the other end, tied to the future of countless citizens of the Xianzhou.
All along, she had been walking on a tightrope that could give way at any moment, but she couldn't look back, nor could she stop...

Just like that near-death beginning.

— The divination reads: The noble strives diligently and unceasingly, vigilant as if peril lurks within the night.

storyItems.title: Character Story: Part IV
storyItems.text:
"Radiant heaven, morph into arrows. Celestial thunder, cleanse the flesh and bone."
A voice of absolute authority, seemingly resonating through every bone in her body, echoed in the deepest recesses of consciousness. Even after enduring the Rainbow Ordainment, she still had to overcome this final trial before truly taking up the mantle and claiming the title of "General."

"First Arrow, Purge Calamities!"
Even in this realm of pure consciousness, her hair stood on end as an unprecedented sense of danger seared across her nerves like electricity. She focused intently on detecting its direction, muttering the verses:
The "celestial thunder" struck violently, and the Barrier trembles in fright, like a planet on the brink of destruction. She barely dodged this arrow. One hair's breadth closer, and she would have been obliterated.

"Second Arrow: Fell the Unbridled!"
The ordeal continued relentlessly, giving no room to breathe. She drew upon every bit of knowledge she had learned to extrapolate the trajectory. Once again, she managed to dodge the arrow with perfect precision.

"Third Arrow!"
"Fourth Arrow!"
...
"Seventh Arrow!"
Like a lonely boat in a surging river, like a butterfly in a sea of thorns, the only thing keeping her from falling was her eyes that could peer into the unknown.
But her spirit was gradually scattering, her steps becoming slower... As time passed, her spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak.

"Eighth Arrow: Quell the Defiant!"

"I can't dodge this..."
She heard her own despair. So close to the summit, yet falling at the final step... Death and failure cast their shadows over her, blinding her as the merciless lightning of the Reignbow loomed above.

Tilting her face to meet the descending celestial thunder, the memories of the distant past abruptly resurfaced, a divination from her Master, and that bygone day when thunder roared over fair skies.
"If we can't dodge it, might as well sit back and enjoy this once-in-a-lifetime spectacle!"
She heard her younger self say those words.
The eighth bolt of celestial thunder struck beside her, the impact rustling her hair, but she remained unmoved.

The ninth arrow never fell, and the imposing voice told her that she had passed the trial.

To this day, she still does not know whether that final bolt waits somewhere in the unwritten future, ready to drop without warning.
But as she departs for Planarcadia, she no longer cares.
— The divination reads: From the abyss to the sky, no blame shall follow.

name: Yao Guang
descHash: Mysterious, bold, radical... her quest for change is stunning. With the "eye" of The Hunt, she sees all fates. Though she knows fate is immutable, the Seer Strategist still walks into danger alone. With the odds stacked against her, how can she possibly change her destiny?
